database.description: Whether the service requires a managed database

runtime.description: Golden-path runtime. Only 'go' is scaffoldable today (service-template-api); other runtimes are reserved for future golden-path templates.

exposure.description: internal: ClusterIP only. public: fronted by an ALB (adds cost, see /cost-estimate).

tier.description: Reliability/sizing tier. tier-1 = critical/high-traffic, tier-2 = standard (default), tier-3 = low-traffic internal tool. Drives replica count, resource requests/limits, and the cost estimate.
